blended.narrative: Canyon Ski Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 49°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: light freezing rain, highs of 49°F.
Friday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
